docs.description: Use for pipeline contracts, stop-ship rules, structure preservation, and artifact specs

configs.description: Use for CF rules, stop-ship tokens, artifact profiles, and review queue configs

codebase.description: Codebase map and architecture inspector. Use to understand module layout, find files, trace call chains.

validate.description: Runs validators against a workbook or the full suite. Use to verify OOXML structure, stop-ship tokens, and web Excel compatibility.
Run validators: full suite, or specific test file/gate check

harness-inspect.description: Inspect the repo harness: codebase map, validators, known traps, workflow specs
